div.span: Real-time business risk decisions for CRM, Finance, and workforce workflows

div.div: Decision engine backend is offline. Dashboard is showing local fallback activity data.
⚠ Attack pattern drift detected — distribution shift vs baseline (PSI alert)
No scans yet — use Sandbox tab.
No blocked actions yet. Run one in Decision Lab.

div.p: Blocked ERP input → optional Jira escalation for the security team
Example workflow — when a real BLOCK is logged, this panel shows live module, score, and Jira fields from Odoo.

div.div: No actions yet. Try running an ERP scenario via the backend or CRM.
No user activity recorded for yet.

div.p: Unified feed for employee authentication, ERP decision events, and integration health signals.
div.div: No activity yet. Try a failed login or a Decision Lab scan.

div.p: Tiered LLM invokes semantic scoring only in the gray band (plus a small drift sample). Repeated payloads reuse a short TTL decision cache.
Counters stay at zero while the API is offline.

div.div: No audit events in the last 24 hours.

div.h3: What The ERP Protection Layer Covers

div.span: All CRM contact form submissions and lead inputs — scanned for SQLi, XSS, Prompt Injection and more
Every login, logout, and session event — captured in the Audit Trail with IP and timestamp
Website contact and signup forms — analyzed for business risk before submission is accepted
Live test payloads you run below — same decision engine, results appear in recent decisions immediately

div.p: This is how SafeO classifies real-time ERP activity into risk levels.

div.div: No scored activities yet — run Decision Lab or CRM tests.
No authentication or audit activity recorded yet.

div.p: Runs curated payloads through the real-time ERP risk scorer — entropy, keyword detection, and behavioral signals.
Click an investigation to expand — agent conversation appears below.

div.div: Agent logs unavailable for this investigation
No investigations yet. BLOCK decisions trigger auto-investigation.

div.p: Native SafeO module — ERP workflows protected in-process.

div.pre: from safeo_sdk.python.client import SafeOClient client = SafeOClient(api_key="internal") result = client.scan("payload", context={"source_system": "myapp"}) print(result["decision"])

div.p: All AI runs locally on AMD GPU — no OpenAI.
POST /v1/scan — tiered ML pipeline. Same backend for standalone API and Odoo CRM hooks.

div.t: Odoo CRM inject: lead_id=, decision=, risk=%
div.div: Also injected into Odoo CRM — open CRM pipeline
